ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exams" (
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam session */,
  "exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the exam */,
  "exam_day" TEXT /* Day of the exam (e.g., Tuesday, Wednesday) */,
  "session" TEXT /* Session of the exam (e.g., FN, AN) */,
  "subject_code" TEXT /* Code of the subject */,
  "subject_title" TEXT /* Title of the subject */,
  "exam_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of exam (e.g., regular, retake, special) */,
  "exam_room_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exam room where the exam is held */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor conducting the exam */,
  "exam_format" TEXT /* Format of the exam (e.g., written, practical) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the exam in minutes */,
  "exam_category" TEXT /* Category of the exam (e.g., theory, lab) */,
  "special_needs_accommodations" TEXT /* Accommodations for students with special needs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exams_exam_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_room_id") REFERENCES exam_rooms ("exam_room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exams_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exams_exam_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_type_id") REFERENCES exam_types ("exam_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_types" (
  "exam_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam type */,
  "exam_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the exam type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exam type */,
  "exam_type_category" TEXT /* Category of the exam type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_rooms" (
  "exam_room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam room */,
  "room_name" TEXT /* Name of the exam room */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the exam room */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exam room (e.g., Building A, Room 101) */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of the exam room (e.g., lecture hall, lab) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "instructor_type" TEXT /* Type of the instructor (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program" TEXT /* Program of study (e.g., BSc, MSc, PhD) */,
  "year_joined" TEXT /* Year the student joined the program */,
  "student_type" TEXT /* Type of the student (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam registration */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam session */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the student registered for the exam */,
  "registration_status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_registrations_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_registrations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam result */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam session */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "score" REAL /* Score obtained by the student */,
  "pass_fail" TEXT /* Pass or fail status */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the result was announced */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade obtained by the student (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam material */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam session */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., question paper, answer sheet) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the material */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the material file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the material was uploaded */,
  "material_status" TEXT /* Status of the material (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_materials_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam session */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date the attendance was recorded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., Present, Absent) */,
  "attendance_type" TEXT /* Type of attendance (e.g., regular, makeup) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_attendance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_attendance_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_rooms_equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "exam_room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam room */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the equipment available */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "equipment_status" TEXT /* Status of the equipment (e.g., working, not working) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_rooms_equipment_exam_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_room_id") REFERENCES exam_rooms ("exam_room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_room_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room schedule */,
  "exam_room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam room */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the exam */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the exam */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Date the exam is scheduled */,
  "schedule_status" TEXT /* Status of the schedule (e.g., confirmed, tentative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_room_schedules_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_room_schedules_exam_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_room_id") REFERENCES exam_rooms ("exam_room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subject_parts" (
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part of a subject */,
  "subject_code" TEXT /* Code of the subject */,
  "part_name" TEXT /* Name of the part */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the part */,
  "part_type" TEXT /* Type of the part (e.g., theory, practical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subject_parts_subject_code FOREIGN KEY ("subject_code") REFERENCES exams ("subject_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, instructor, admin) */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of the user (e.g., staff, faculty) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or feedback */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_comments_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_grading_schemes" (
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grading scheme */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam session */,
  "scheme_name" TEXT /* Name of the grading scheme */,
  "scheme_description" TEXT /* Description of the grading scheme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scheme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_grading_schemes_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id")
)
